summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW legal/compliance features for 'Народный Контроль' app. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully. Features tested: Support ticket system (FAQ, create/list/reply/close tickets), Terms of Service page, Privacy Policy page (152-FZ compliant), Consent checkboxes on login, Cookie banner, Legal info API endpoint.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/support/faq returns 8 FAQ items
Backend: FAQ endpoint is public (no auth required)
Backend: GET /api/legal/info returns operator details with operator_name, inn, ogrn, email, age_restriction
Backend: Legal info endpoint is public (no auth required)
Backend: POST /api/support/tickets requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: GET /api/support/tickets requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: Authenticated POST /api/support/tickets creates ticket with subject, message, category
Backend: Authenticated GET /api/support/tickets returns user's tickets
Backend: Authenticated GET /api/support/tickets/{ticket_id} returns ticket with messages
Backend: Authenticated POST /api/support/tickets/{ticket_id}/reply adds reply message
Backend: Authenticated PUT /api/support/tickets/{ticket_id}/status changes status to closed
Backend: POST /api/auth/consent requires auth (returns 401)
Backend: Authenticated POST /api/auth/consent records consent successfully
Backend: Admin GET /api/admin/support/tickets returns all tickets
Backend: Admin can filter tickets by status
Backend: Creating ticket with empty subject returns 400
Backend: Creating ticket with empty message returns 400
Backend: Replying with empty text returns 400
Backend: Getting nonexistent ticket returns 404
Backend: Creating tickets with all 6 categories works (question, bug, complaint, suggestion, rights_violation, other)
Frontend: Login page shows consent checkbox (data-testid='consent-checkbox')
Frontend: Login page shows age checkbox (data-testid='age-checkbox')
Frontend: Google login button is DISABLED when checkboxes unchecked
Frontend: Google login button is ENABLED after checking both boxes
Frontend: Consent checkbox text contains links to /terms and /privacy
Frontend: Age restriction text (16+ and ФЗ-436) displayed on login page
Frontend: /terms page renders with full Terms of Service document (9 sections + operator details)
Frontend: /terms page accessible without auth (public)
Frontend: /terms page has back link to /login
Frontend: /privacy page renders with full Privacy Policy document (9 sections + contacts)
Frontend: /privacy page accessible without auth (public)
Frontend: /privacy page compliant with 152-ФЗ (references Роскомнадзор, DPO contact)
Frontend: Cookie banner appears at bottom of page (data-testid='cookie-banner')
Frontend: Cookie banner has 'Принять' button (data-testid='cookie-accept-btn')
Frontend: Cookie banner sets localStorage 'nk_cookies_accepted' after clicking accept
Frontend: /support page renders with FAQ tab and tickets tab
Frontend: Support page FAQ shows 8 expandable FAQ items
Frontend: Support page has 'Обращение' button to create ticket (data-testid='create-ticket-btn')
Frontend: Create ticket modal shows 6 category buttons (question, bug, complaint, suggestion, rights_violation, other)
Frontend: Create ticket modal shows subject input (data-testid='ticket-subject-input')
Frontend: Create ticket modal shows message textarea (data-testid='ticket-message-input')
Frontend: Create ticket modal shows submit button (data-testid='submit-ticket-btn')
Frontend: Navigation sidebar includes 'Поддержка' link to /support
Frontend: Sidebar footer shows links to Соглашение (/terms) and Конфиденциальность (/privacy)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for new features
Support ticket system fully functional with CRUD operations
Legal pages (Terms/Privacy) are public and accessible without auth
Cookie banner uses localStorage correctly for persistence
Consent checkboxes properly control Google login button disabled state
152-ФЗ compliance references included in Privacy Policy
High-priority tickets (rights_violation, complaint) correctly marked with priority='high'
seed_data_creation: Used existing test session (test_session_comprehensive_1773178288724) - updated expires_at to string format for compatibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new legal/compliance features are fully functional. Test session token: test_session_comprehensive_1773178288724 (admin role, 500 points). Support tickets created during testing have TEST_ prefix. Cookie banner uses localStorage key 'nk_cookies_accepted'. Terms/Privacy pages are public routes. Consent checkboxes on login control Google button disabled state. FAQ has 8 items. Ticket categories: question, bug, complaint, suggestion, rights_violation, other.
